symptoms.symptom_name: Sudden severe constant epigastric pain radiating straight to the back

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Retroperitoneal pancreatic inflammation classically bores straight through to the back.
Sudden severe epigastric pain is also consistent with perforation.
Epigastric pain can be atypical ACS; posture-dependence argues against it but cannot exclude remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pain worse supine, relieved by leaning forward

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Positional relief on sitting forward is a well-recognised feature of pancreatic pain.
Perforation peritonism is typically worse with any movement, not specifically relieved by leaning forward.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profound nausea with non-bilious, non-bloody vomiting

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Vomiting accompanies most acute pancreatitis; non-bloody vomit argues against upper GI haemorrhage.

symptoms.symptom_name: Large high-fat meal immediately preceding onset

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A fatty load acutely raises triglycerides and can trigger an attack in familial hypertriglyceridaemia.

symptoms.symptom_name: Familial dyslipidaemia with lipid-lowering therapy ceased ~3 months ago

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Uncontrolled severe hypertriglyceridaemia after stopping fibrate/statin is a direct cause of pancreatitis.
Premature atherosclerotic disease marks the chronicity and severity of the underlying lipid derangement.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of recent alcohol use and no known gallstones

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Removes the two commonest pancreatitis aetiologies (gallstones, alcohol), foregrounding the metabolic cause.

symptoms.symptom_name: Eruptive xanthomas on extensor arms, xanthelasmas and corneal arcus

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Eruptive xanthomas indicate very high triglycerides; xanthelasma/arcus indicate chronic hyperlipidaemia. Diagnostic stigmata — sealed clinician examination, not assumed from chat.

symptoms.symptom_name: Epigastric tenderness with guarding, hypoactive bowel sounds, no board-like rigidity

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Localised epigastric peritonism without generalised rigidity fits pancreatitis over free perforation — a sealed clinician examination finding the AI cannot obtain.
Early systemic inflammatory response; precise clinician vitals are sealed — the AI infers systemic upset from the patient's reported sweating/racing heart, not a measured number.

investigation_details.expected_result: Markedly elevated (>3x upper limit of normal)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Diagnosis of pancreatitis not confirmed; severity and management delayed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Lipase >3x ULN with a compatible picture confirms acute pancreatitis — hospital-only, never available in real-time telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fasting lipid panel showing massive hypertriglyceridaemia

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Metabolic driver missed; recurrence risk not addressed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Confirms the hypertriglyceridaemic aetiology and guides triglyceride-lowering therapy.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Positional back-boring epigastric pain with vomiting, a fatty-meal trigger and lapsed lipid therapy in familial dyslipidaemia together strongly indicate hypertriglyceridaemia-induced pancreatitis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: First-line confirmatory test for acute pancreatitis — a hospital blood test the AI arranges by escalating, not by ordering remotely.
Identifies the severe hypertriglyceridaemia driving the attack and directs triglyceride-lowering.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: FBC, U&E, calcium, glucose, LFTs, ABG (severity work-up)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Feeds severity scoring (modified Glasgow/APACHE) and guides fluid resuscitation — hospital investigations.
Excludes atypical MI given epigastric pain and premature vascular disease — part of the ED work-up, not obtainable via chat.
Excludes gallstones and perforation and assesses pancreatic complications; performed in hospital.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Home self-testing or delaying transfer to 'try analgesia first'
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: There is no appropriate home investigation; any attempt to work this up remotely or delay transfer risks a deteriorating acute abdomen.
